goal: Run local benchmarks to decide if PDF page images should use WebP and what quality parameter should be selected.
deliverable: Evidence-backed recommendation with raw benchmark data and a concrete quality decision.
acceptanceCriteria: Measure encode time and blob size for current and target page sizes
Compare multiple WebP quality settings against JPEG and PNG baselines
State whether WebP improves performance in this workload
nonGoals: Claim full app-level perf improvement from encode-only data
assumptions: A synthetic text-heavy canvas is a valid proxy for the page-image encode step
pdf.js rasterization cost is out of scope for this benchmark and analyzed separately
